context._comment_safe_flags: These flags are safe to enable — they produce zero CloudFormation template drift against the currently deployed stacks.
context._comment_deferred_flags: These flags are recommended by CDK but produce template changes requiring a deploy. Enable them together in a planned maintenance window.
context._deferred_@aws-cdk/core:enablePartitionL: Hardcodes partition ARNs (41 changes, 2 Lambda Permission replacements — brief API Gateway invoke gap)
